chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Karachi CP No.D-4785 of 2024 (Gulzar Ahmed v. Province of Sindh and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on Misc. No.22533/2024 2. For order on office objection No.01 & 03 3. For order on Misc. No.21215/2024 4. For order on Misc. No.21216/2024 5. For hearing of main case 15.10.2024 M/s. Muhammad Faisal and Waqar Anwar, advocates for the petitioner --------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. The petitioner, by way of the instant petition, has sought the removal of the subject construction under the deception that it is illegal, unauthorized and has been raised with substandard material. Whether it has been raised illegally by using substandard material is a question involving a factual controversy; the same could not be resolved by this Court directing its removal in the exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction by way of the instant petition; the same being misconceived is dismissed in limine; the same even otherwise is hit by laches. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir/PA*
